papers.title: Learning Terrain-Aware Whole-Body Control for Perceptive Legged Loco-Manipulation
papers.summary: 本文提出TA-WBC地形感知全身控制框架，通过混合外部感知编码器提取地形特征，结合脚接触平面末端采样与双策略蒸馏，实现复杂地形下的全身运动操作的稳定控制。

companyNews.title: Tesla Optimus & Musk face a new threat — OpenAI Robotics - Yahoo Finance
companyNews.summary: Tesla Optimus面临OpenAI Robotics的竞争威胁，OpenAI可能进军人形机器人领域，这将加剧行业竞争，推动技术创新和市场分化。

companyNews.title: Tesla Stock Drops. OpenAI Is Coming for One Line of Its Business. - Barron's
companyNews.summary: Tesla股价下跌，反映市场对其前景担忧；OpenAI拟进入Tesla相关业务领域，加剧科技巨头在AI与机器人赛道的竞争，可能推动人形机器人行业加速发展。

companyNews.title: Why Tesla stock is sinking over 4% today - TradingView
companyNews.summary: Tesla股价今日跌幅超4%，反映市场对其业绩或战略的担忧。作为人形机器人领域的头部企业，其股价波动可能影响投资者对该新兴行业的信心与投入。

companyNews.title: Cantor Fitzgerald reiterates Tesla stock rating on Optimus ramp - Investing.com
companyNews.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald重申特斯拉股票评级，关注Optimus机器人产能爬坡进展，显示资本市场对特斯拉人形机器人商业化前景保持信心。

companyNews.title: Tesla's Spain sales surge 112.8% in May as electric vehicle demand grows - TradingView
